use_cases: Sticky header navigation that appears on scroll with glassmorphism blur effect
Responsive mobile menu with animated hamburger toggle and overlay navigation
Website navigation with scroll-based visibility triggers at 100px threshold
Multi-component navbar system supporting desktop and mobile layouts
Backdrop-filtered navigation bar with shadow animations on scroll
ai_summary: A responsive resizable navbar component with glassmorphism styling, featuring scroll-based visibility detection that triggers at 100px scroll depth. Includes backdrop blur effects, animated shadows, and a fully-featured mobile navigation menu with toggle icons. Built as a composite system with Navbar, NavBody, NavItems, MobileNav, and related sub-components for flexible composition.
